title: Knulp: Drei Geschichten aus dem Leben Knulps
summaries: "Knulp: Drei Geschichten aus dem Leben Knulps" by Hermann Hesse is a novella published in 1915. It follows Knulp, a wandering tramp who drifts through small towns, forming fleeting connections with the settled people he encounters. Through three interconnected tales, we witness his carefree existence, his philosophical reflections on freedom and loneliness, and the bittersweet consequences of a life lived without roots. As illness shadows his travels, Knulp must confront what his chosen path has truly meant. (This is an automatically generated summary.)
